author: Nik M
description: Kanban-style card view with column grouping, tag filtering, and property chips. Group notes by tags or any frontmatter property. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Nik M
manifest.description: Kanban-style card view with column grouping, tag filtering, property chips, and split-pane preview. Group notes by tags or any frontmatter property.
manifest.name: Card Columns

name: Card Columns

releases.author: mamadaevv
releases.description:
## What's new

### Card Cover
- Completely new **Cover** system in gear menu — every card can display a cover image
- **Source** — use note's first image, a dedicated `cover` frontmatter property, or disable
- **Style** — Borderless (full bleed) or Bordered (inside padding)
- **Aspect ratio** — Auto (natural image height), 1:1, 3:2, 4:3, 16:9; Landscape / Portrait swaps the ratio
- **Image fit** — Cover (crop edges) or Contain (fit whole)
- **Position** — Above title, Below title, or After all properties
- Cover‑only mode when cover is enabled and no properties are visible
- Image files (PNG, JPG, etc.) use themselves as cover automatically

### Bug Fixes
- **Modal preview freeze** — clicking PNG or other binary files no longer freezes Obsidian
- **Split pane focus** — opening a file no longer steals keyboard focus from columns view
- **Open behavior default** — fallback corrected from 'split‑right' to 'modal'

## Installation
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` from this release and copy them to your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/card-columns/`.

releases.author: mamadaevv
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Masonry layout** — new toggle in General settings. When enabled, cards in multi-column mode are arranged with CSS columns (natural vertical flow, cards fill gaps). Each card keeps its actual height — tall cards dont create empty rows.
- Updated README with all new features

## Installation

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` from this release and copy them to your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/card-columns/`.

releases.author: mamadaevv
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Multi-column groups** — display multiple cards per column in a grid layout (1–6 columns, configurable in General settings)
- **Zebra striping** — alternate column backgrounds for easier visual scanning (toggle in General settings)
- Card header now stays outside the scroll container (no more sticky header issues)
- Fixed horizontal scroll edge-cases in multi-column mode (4px safety margin)

## Installation

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` from this release and copy them to your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/card-columns/`.

releases.author: mamadaevv
releases.description:
## Features

- **Split View** — open cards in a right or bottom split pane (LMB reuses the pane, Ctrl+LMB opens a new tab)
- **Split Right / Split Down** configurable in 'Open card in' settings

## Fixes

- Robust split leaf lifecycle — handles manual pane closes gracefully
- Redesigned property labels: normal weight, normal casing, one size smaller than value
- Card title from first visible property (matching native Cards view)
- Empty properties show en‑dash (—)
- Backlinks/embeds/outlinks as clickable links
- Resizable filter bar with cursor hint
- Removed global select styling that conflicted with Obsidian UI

## Documentation

- Demo videos embedded in README
- Detailed filter usage instructions
releases.name: v0.3.0 — Split View

releases.author: mamadaevv
releases.description: Fix release assets for community submission.
releases.name: v0.2.1

releases.author: mamadaevv
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Column grouping** — group notes by tags or any frontmatter property
- **Tag filtering** — left-click to filter, Ctrl+Click/right-click to toggle, OR/AND modes
- **Property chips** — view frontmatter as styled chips (text, tags, booleans, links, dates)
- **Moment.js date formatting** — custom format + locale support
- **Grid/Stack layout** — compact inline or structured vertical property view
- **Resizable filter bar** — drag the bottom edge to resize
- **Card preview modal** — click to preview, "Open" button, internal link navigation

## Demo

Embedded demo videos with overview, setup guide, and filtering walkthrough.

## Installation

- Obsidian Community Plugins (pending)
- Manual: copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` to `.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-columns/`
releases.name: v0.2.0 — Initial release
